label: Hero
prompt: Create a premium hero image with the full product clearly visible on a clean clinical or wellness-oriented background. Preserve exact packaging, branding, color, and structural details.

label: Lifestyle
prompt: Create a calm wellness composition with tasteful supporting props and a clean environment. Keep the product fully visible and strictly unchanged.

label: Wearable
prompt: Create an in-use or contextual wellness composition where applicable, while preserving the exact product design, packaging, and branding.

label: Wearable ethnic
prompt: Create a second premium wellness setup with a different angle and contextual variation. Keep the product clearly visible and faithful to the reference.

label: Jewellery Box
prompt: Create a product-first premium composition with minimal wellness props and strong product emphasis. Preserve exact design and packaging details.

label: Close Detail
prompt: Create a close detail shot highlighting packaging finish, texture, material quality, or applicator details without changing the product.
